parameters.query:
SELECT
  i.*,
  i.id                    AS issue_id,
  i.title                 AS issue_title,
  i.created_at            AS issue_created_at,
  i.status                AS issue_status,
  i.priority              AS issue_priority,

  pm.id                   AS project_id,
  pm.title                AS project_title,

  -- issue owner
  io.email                AS issue_owner_email,
  io.firstname            AS issue_owner_firstname,
  io.lastname             AS issue_owner_lastname,

  -- project manager
  pmo.email               AS project_manager_email,
  pmo.firstname           AS project_manager_firstname,
  pmo.lastname            AS project_manager_lastname

FROM issues i

-- issue owner
JOIN spree_users io
  ON io.id = i.responsible_person_id

-- project
JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = i.project_management_id

-- project manager
JOIN spree_users pmo
  ON pmo.id = pm.owner_id

WHERE
  i.created_at >= UTC_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL 60 MINUTE;

mySql.name: New FM UAT Task Management Database

parameters.subject: =New Issue Logged: {{$json.issue_title}}
